remarks: HEAT and HOT WATER are INCLUDED in the rent. Move right into the freshly updated unit. Just seconds from Norwalk Hospital, Route 7 Connector, i95, and the Merritt Parkway, this unit defines efficiency for a daily commuter. Refinished hardwoods are present throughout with recessed lighting in each room. Freshly painted walls make this unit feel as though you're the first to occupy it. The kitchen is small, but updated, with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. Finally, an updated full bathroom completes this beautiful apartment. There is a parking space included in this unit. Small dogs are ok. AVAILABLE JULY 9th.
